# AI Command Center - gateway

> This is a running AI Command Center gateway: a transparent LLM proxy + usage/cost
> dashboard. Route your app's LLM calls through it by pointing the provider SDK's
> base URL here. Your API key passes through untouched; prompt/response bodies are
> never stored (metadata only).

Integrate (replace the origin with this gateway's origin):
- OpenAI-compatible: `<origin>/p/<project>/openai/v1`
- Anthropic: `<origin>/p/<project>/anthropic`
- Gemini: `<origin>/p/<project>/gemini`
- Also: openrouter, mistral, deepseek, xai, groq, together, ollama, + custom
- Zero code change: set OPENAI_BASE_URL / ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL / GOOGLE_GEMINI_BASE_URL
- Group by project via the `/p/<project>/` path or an `x-aicc-project` header
- With auth enabled use `/k/<gateway-key>/…` (the key authenticates and sets the project) or header `x-aicc-key`
- Group calls into a session with an `x-aicc-trace` header; track prompts with `x-aicc-prompt` and `x-aicc-prompt-version`
- Report usage the proxy can't see: `POST <origin>/api/track` with JSON {project, provider, model, tokensIn, tokensOut, trace?, prompt?, promptVersion?}
- Provider routing (opt-in): call `<origin>/p/<project>/r/<route>/…` to fail over / load-balance across a configured pool of same-schema providers (config.routes)

Dashboard views: Overview (cost/usage), Traces (sessions), Prompts (versions + eval scores), Models (comparison), Alerts (budgets + anomalies), Evals (offline quality scoring).

Access control: optional login; roles admin / member / read-only viewer; team-scoped visibility plus per-user project grants; per-project gateway keys.

HTTP API (JSON): GET /health, /api/meta, /api/stats?range=7d, /api/requests, /api/projects, /api/fx, /api/events (SSE), /api/traces, /api/trace?id=, /api/prompts, /api/models, /api/anomalies, /api/alerts, /api/evals, /api/evals/run?id=; POST /api/track, /api/evals/run, /api/evals/dataset (admin); admin: POST /api/admin/budget.

Docs & source: https://github.com/adityasarade/ai-command-center - MIT.
